name: G & M Automotive Transport Inc
recent_news: No M&A or major news identified; remains a small DeSoto, TX NEMT/special-needs medical transport operator with active SAFER/FMCSA registration and federal contractor profile.
fit_notes: Poor fit as a school-bus tuck-in: this is a NEMT/wheelchair-van micro-operator (~4 employees, ~$335K rev) with no evidence of yellow-bus school district contracts. Possible niche SPED/medical school routes at best; sub-scale for Summit.

name: BML Transportation Svc LLC
principals: Thomas Hardy Jr. (Owner/Operator, BML Transportation Services LLC)
Janet Hardy (Owner, BML Freight Services LLC - affiliate)
districts_or_customers: Central Alabama / Montgomery area NEMT riders
recent_news: No M&A activity identified; family-owned Montgomery NEMT operator with affiliated BML Freight Services courier entity; active BBB profile.
fit_notes: Poor fit: NEMT/courier micro-operator, not a school-bus contractor. No evidence of district contracts or yellow buses; too small (~5 employees, ~$326K) and outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in profile.

name: Central Wheelchair-Van
districts_or_customers: Elder Services of the Merrimack Valley
recent_news: No M&A or notable news identified; continues as an independent Haverhill, MA wheelchair-van NEMT provider serving MassHealth and Elder Services contracts.
fit_notes: Poor fit: this is a NEMT/elder & disability wheelchair-van service, not a school transportation contractor. No evidence of district yellow-bus or SPED school routes; sub-scale for Summit.

name: Furlegan Management LLC
owner_or_parent: independent (operates as MasterCare of South Carolina LLC; Furlegan Management is the holding/management entity)
districts_or_customers: ModivCare/LogistiCare brokered trips (typical for SC NEMT)
recent_news: No M&A activity identified; MasterCare of South Carolina established 2012, operates from Easley and Greenwood SC; Furlegan Management LLC is the related operating/holding entity at the Easley address.
fit_notes: Poor fit: MasterCare/Furlegan is a NEMT wheelchair-van operator (Medicaid trips), not a yellow-bus school contractor. No evidence of K-12 district contracts; outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in target profile despite ~35 employees.

name: Powell Transportation LLC
service_types: non-emergency medical transport / support activities for transportation
districts_or_customers: Dyer County / Dyersburg TN area NEMT clients
recent_news: No M&A activity identified; Powell Transportation Services LLC founded 2005 in Dyersburg TN; D&B shows ~$631K revenue and ~10 employees; remains family-owned and independent.
fit_notes: Poor fit as school-bus tuck-in: NEMT/support-services micro-operator in rural West TN. No evidence of Dyer County Schools or Dyersburg City Schools yellow-bus contracts. Too small and wrong service line for Summit.
